notes: v2.4.19 - Non-Conformance module rebuilt on one consistent dark theme with table/tile views and smooth tab switching; NCR Analytics now follows the selected timeframe with real metrics and CSV export (TKT-00222). Quality batch: Internal Audit and RMA categories restored, Customer Rejection filter in CAPAs, optional project on vendor NCRs, cancellation reasons captured and shown, CAPA notes in the exported report (empty sections hidden), per-CAPA export, bulk photo upload, and CAPA reassignment notifications. CNC: removing a part's CNC process now clears its queue item (TKT-00221), and the project CNC analytics dashboard loads again after a collation fix (TKT-00226). RP queue: every unit of a multi-quantity part now appears as its own grouped instance, with existing builds backfilled. Projects: the build list refreshes immediately when you switch projects (TKT-00225). Planner: notify a specific person now accepts multiple recipients; Teams Open in AOS opens reliably and tidies its hand-off tab.
